mapper.sql: a.id as id ,a.kecheng_id as kechengId ,a.chapter_id as chapterId ,a.resource_name as resourceName ,a.resource_type as resourceType ,a.resource_url as resourceUrl ,a.cover_url as coverUrl ,a.duration_seconds as durationSeconds ,a.resource_status as resourceStatus ,a.review_remark as reviewRemark ,a.review_time as reviewTime ,a.review_admin_id as reviewAdminId ,a.is_deleted as isDeleted ,a.create_time as createTime
